name: titanos
description: TITANOS universal AI agent desktop workspace
author: TITANOS Team

scripts.ui:desktop: npm run ui:build && npm run ui:stage
scripts.dist:win: npm run ui:desktop && npm run backend:bundle && npm run desktop:stage-backend && npm run backend:smoke && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:mac: npm run ui:desktop && npm run backend:bundle && npm run desktop:stage-backend && npm run backend:smoke && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run ui:desktop && npm run backend:bundle && npm run desktop:stage-backend && npm run backend:smoke && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb
scripts.dist:dir: npm run release:clean && npm run ui:desktop && npm run backend:bundle && npm run desktop:stage-backend && npm run backend:smoke && electron-builder --dir && npm run release:manifest
